name: Neapolitan Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown onions and garlic in oil.
2. Add meat to the pan and brown slowly.
3. Heat tomato juice, puree, and paste in a deep kettle; add the meat mixture, chili peppers, salt, pepper, and sugar.
4. Simmer for 2-1/2 to 3 hours until thick.
5. Remove chili peppers and add olives.
6. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Serve with spaghetti, topped with grated Parmesan cheese. Makes sauce for 1 pound of spaghetti.
